div1.entryFree: Wooden, made of wood: Tw. II, 5, 92. IV, 4, 77. H6A I, 1, 19. Lr. II, 3, 16. II, 4, 10. Per. IV, 6, 183. this w. slavery, Tp. III, 1, 62 (piling wood at command). the w. dialogue and sound 'twixt his stretched footing and the scaffoldage, Troil. I, 3, 155. that's a w. thing, H6A V, 3, 89 ('an awkward business, not likely to succeed'. Steevens).
